text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 6 day(s).
label: influenza/moderate

text: I feel mostly fine, just a little less energetic than usual.
label: common_cold/discharge

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 3 day(s) in. My heart feels a little fast.
label: influenza/mild

text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 6 day(s) and scared, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 8 day(s) — nothing terrible yet.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Dangerously high fever, severe muscle pain, utterly exhausted. This has been 9 day(s). I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I feel like I'm suffocating. Severe shortness of breath, chest agony, high fever. 6 day(s) like this, and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Persistent cough with mucus and mild chest discomfort. Started 10 day(s) ago, though it seems to be slowly resolving.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Gasping with each breath, sharp chest pain, high fever, thick productive cough. 13 day(s) now, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Cough with some yellowish mucus and a dull chest ache for 15 day(s), though it seems to be slowly resolving.
label: pneumonia/mild
